hooks.command: if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then session=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}'); case "$session" in \*\ *) ;; *) tmux set-environment -t "$session" CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION "$session" && tmux rename-session -t "$session" "* $session *";; esac; fi

if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then session=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}'); original=$(tmux show-environment -t "$session" CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^[^=]*=//'); if [ -n "$original" ]; then tmux rename-session -t "$session" "$original" && tmux set-environment -t "$original" -u CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION; fi; fi

if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then session=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}'); case "$session" in \*\ *) ;; *) tmux set-environment -t "$session" CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION "$session" && tmux rename-session -t "$session" "* $session *";; esac; fi

if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then session=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}'); original=$(tmux show-environment -t "$session" CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^[^=]*=//'); if [ -n "$original" ]; then tmux rename-session -t "$session" "$original" && tmux set-environment -t "$original" -u CLAUDE_ORIGINAL_SESSION; fi; fi

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); BG_LIGHT_BLUE="69"; BG_DARK_BLUE="60"; BG_DARKEST_BLUE="236"; BG_TEAL="23"; BG_PURPLE="55"; BG_OLIVE="58"; FG_WHITE="231"; FG_BLUE="111"; FG_LIGHT_GRAY="146"; FG_CYAN="116"; FG_LAVENDER="183"; FG_YELLOW="186"; BG_MODEL="90"; FG_MODEL="219"; output=""; dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); case "$dir_name" in Documents) dir_display="  ";; Downloads) dir_display="  ";; Music) dir_display="  ";; Pictures) dir_display="  ";; *) dir_display="$dir_name";; esac; output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  %s \033[0m' "$BG_LIGHT_BLUE" "$FG_WHITE" "$dir_display"); if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || true; branch=$(git -c gc.autoDetach=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git_status_text=""; git -c gc.autoDetach=false diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null || git_status_text="${git_status_text}*"; [ -n "$(git -c gc.autoDetach=false ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null)" ] && git_status_text="${git_status_text}?"; git -c gc.autoDetach=false diff-index --quiet --cached HEAD -- 2>/dev/null || git_status_text="${git_status_text}+"; output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  %s' "$BG_DARK_BLUE" "$FG_BLUE" "$branch"); [ -n "$git_status_text" ] && output+=$(printf ' %s' "$git_status_text"); output+=$(printf ' \033[0m'); fi; fi; ctx_tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // empty'); [ -n "$ctx_tokens" ] && output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  ctx: %sK \033[0m' "$BG_TEAL" "$FG_CYAN" "$(( (ctx_tokens + 500) / 1000 ))"); model_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); [ -n "$model_name" ] && output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  %s \033[0m' "$BG_MODEL" "$FG_MODEL" "$model_name"); effort=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.effort.level // empty'); [ -n "$effort" ] && output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  effort: %s \033[0m' "$BG_OLIVE" "$FG_YELLOW" "$effort"); thinking=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.thinking.enabled // false'); if [ "$thinking" = "true" ]; then thinking_label="on"; else thinking_label="off"; fi; output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm  thinking: %s \033[0m' "$BG_PURPLE" "$FG_LAVENDER" "$thinking_label"); time_str=$(date "+%T, %a %d/%h"); output+=$(printf '\033[48;5;%sm\033[38;5;%sm   %s \033[0m' "$BG_DARKEST_BLUE" "$FG_LIGHT_GRAY" "$time_str"); printf '%s' "$output"

compactPrompt:
When compacting, you MUST preserve:
1. All rules and constraints from CLAUDE.md and system prompt — copy them verbatim
2. Current task context and progress
3. File paths that were modified
4. Specific error messages and their solutions
5. User corrections and preferences stated during the session

You MAY summarize:
- Tool call outputs (keep conclusions, drop raw output)
- File contents that were read (keep what was learned, drop the text)
- Exploratory steps that led nowhere
